_README: 0-based residue indices -> essentiality (catalytic/essential=1.0, binding/modulatory=0.5). Source: UniProt features. CcdB has no ACT_SITE (non-enzymatic toxin); we use experimentally-validated MUTAGEN residues (gyrase-interaction C-terminus) as the functional set. F7YBW8/ParE has no UniProt functional annotations.
